mapper.update: update kb_basic set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select base.id as id, ct.id as ctId, base.title as title, dept.name as deptName, base.pub_time as pubTime, base.exp_time as expTime, model.code as modelCode, base.model_id as modelId, model.name as modelName, base.remark as remark, base.sort as sort, base.create_user as createUser, user.real_name as createName, base.is_deleted as is_deleted, base.status as status, base.attachment as attachmentTmp, null cols, null as propCols, base.auth as createUserId, base.dept_id as deptId, ksw.name as swName, ksw.id as swId, base.word_cloud as wordCloud from kb_basic base left join kb_model model on model.id = base.model_id left join castle_sys_user user on user.id = base.auth left join castle_sys_dept dept on dept.id = base.dept_id left join kb_category ct on ct.id = base.category_id left join kb_subject_warehouse ksw on ct.sw_id = ksw.id where base.id = #{id};

select distinct t.id, ct.sw_id as swId, title, user.real_name as userName, t.create_time as createTime, ct.name as categoryName
from kb_basic t join castle_sys_user user on user.id = t.auth join kb_category ct on ct.id = t.category_id join kb_warehouse_auth auth on ((ct.id = auth.wh_id and auth.category = 01 ) or (ct.sw_id=auth.wh_id and auth.category = 02)) where ct.is_deleted = 2 and auth.is_deleted=2 and t.is_deleted=2 and t.status=1 ORDER BY t.create_time desc limit 16
select DISTINCT t1.name as realName from (select kb.auth as auth, user.real_name as name from kb_basic kb join castle_sys_user user on user.id = kb.auth where kb.is_deleted = 2) t1 limit 15

select t.date_value as yyyyM, ifnull(t2.count, 0) as num from (select distinct date_format(date_value, '%Y-%m') date_value from kb_date where date_format(date_value, '%Y-%m') <= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m') order by date_format(date_value, '%Y-%m') desc limit 12) t left join (select date_format(pub_time, '%Y-%m') pub_time, count(1) count from kb_basic group by date_format(pub_time, '%Y-%m')) t2 on t.date_value = t2.pub_time order by 1

select t.date_value as yyyyM, ifnull(t2.count, 0) as num from (select distinct date_format(date_value, '%Y-%m') date_value from kb_date where date_format(date_value, '%Y-%m') <= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m') order by date_format(date_value, '%Y-%m') desc limit 12) t left join (select date_format(pub_time, '%Y-%m') pub_time, count(1) count from kb_basic where category_id in (
#{item} ) and auth =#{userId} group by date_format(pub_time, '%Y-%m')) t2 on t.date_value = t2.pub_time order by 1

select t4.name,t4.num from (select t1.name, t1.sort, sum(ifnull(t3.count, 0)) num from (select * from kb_subject_warehouse where is_deleted = 2 and status = 1) t1 left join (select * from kb_category where is_deleted = 2) t2 on t1.id = t2.sw_id left join (select category_id, count(1) count from kb_basic where is_deleted = 2 and status = 1 group by 1) t3 on t3.category_id = t2.id group by 1, 2 order by num desc limit #{num}) t4 order by t4.sort
